title: Medieval sword
description: Ресурс пак заменяющий стандартный железный меч-Resource pack replacing the standard iron sword
body: ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a6f223198e182f7c870fd0680a32c9a42860b92_0.webp)Resource pack replacing a standard iron sword on a custom. To replace the iron sword with a custom you need to rename it on a "medieval sword"
